_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: [primary_deadline] 30 December 2026: PRIMARY COMPLIANCE DEADLINE — Application of substantive operator and non-SME trader obligations for large and medium operators. All in-scope products placed on the EU market or exported on or after this date require due diligence statements.
